0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Streaming & Delta Sync"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Real-time memory event streaming and incremental synchronization for distributed agent setups."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"MemoryStream"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Thread-safe event stream with push (callbacks) and pull (iterator) patterns."}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\nfrom mnemosyne.core.streaming import EventType\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nstream = mem.stream\n\nmem.remember(\"test memory\")\n\n# Pull via callback\nstream.on(EventType.MEMORY_ADDED, lambda event: print(f\"Event: {event.event_type}\"))\n\n# Pull via iterator\nstream.listen()\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"DeltaSync"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Checkpoint-based incremental synchronization."}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"mem_a = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-a\")\nmem_b = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-b\")\n\n# Compute and apply delta\ndelta = mem_a.delta_sync.compute_delta(peer_id=\"agent-b\")\nmem_b.delta_sync.apply_delta(\"agent-a\", delta)\n\n# Bidirectional sync\nmem_a.delta_sync.sync_to(\"agent-b\")\nmem_a.delta_sync.sync_from(peer_id=\"agent-b\", delta=delta, table=\"working_memory\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[false,["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"DeltaSync uses memory IDs and timestamps for minimal change sets. Only new or modified memories transfer."}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Related"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/pattern-detection","children":"Architecture: Pattern Detection"}]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/plugin-system","children":"Architecture: Plugin System"}]}],"\n"]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01o_465-h6ryu.js","async":true}]],["$","$L5",null,{"children":["$","$6",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@7"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"SYdR-kKTHjaVYHTV66vjl"}
